title: Sterile Filter Integrity Test Failure (Post-Use)
description: Post-use bubble point test on sterilizing grade filter (EQ-FIL-008) failed. Recorded bubble point was 3.0 bar (Acceptance criteria >= 3.2 bar per SOP-STER-014).

timeline.event: Post-use integrity test initiated by EMP-3188.
Palltronic tester printed FAIL result (3.0 bar).

root_cause: Inadequate wetting of the filter membrane prior to testing. The filter was wetted for only 2 minutes instead of the required 5 minutes per SOP-STER-014.
outcome: Batch quarantined during investigation. Re-test after proper 5-minute wetting passed (3.4 bar). Root cause confirmed as false failure due to operator error. Batch released.
lessons_learned: Wetting time is critical for accurate integrity testing. Automation controls should be implemented to prevent testing if wetting time is < 5 mins.

title: Bioreactor Temperature Excursion
description: SCADA alarm triggered for high temperature (38.5C) in Bioreactor EQ-BIO-014 during exponential growth phase. Setpoint is 37.0C +/- 0.5C.

timeline.event: Chilled water valve opened to 100% manually by operator.

root_cause: Calibration drift on temperature probe T-402, confirmed by CAL-2026-042.
outcome: Batch B-2026-012 cell viability dropped by 15%, but final titer was within specification. Batch released.
lessons_learned: Increase calibration frequency for T-402 probes from 180 days to 90 days.

title: Missing Operator Signature on Batch Record
description: During QA review of EBR, the signature for 'Verify Fill Weight' was found missing.
root_cause: MES system timeout occurred right as the operator was applying their biometric signature.
outcome: System audit logs confirmed the operator was logged in and performed the check. Signature applied retrospectively with justification.
lessons_learned: MES timeout logic adjusted to save signature state before session expiration.
